definitions: 使恼怒，使烦躁；刺激，使发炎（如皮肤、眼睛等）

examples.text: Digital exclusion is a major threat to wider societal equality in the UK, so witnessing companies like Facebook championing the metaverse (元宇宙) as the next great frontier when school children are struggling to complete their homework feels particularly irritating.
examples.explanation: 这里的 irritating 是形容词，表示“令人恼火的、让人烦躁的”。整句意思是：当许多学童还在艰难完成作业时，看到像 Facebook 这样的公司把元宇宙宣传为下一个重大前沿，会让人觉得尤其令人恼火。该例有助于理解 irritate / irritating 在真实语境中表达“惹人烦、让人生气”的用法。
